label: Browser pages
summary: Public and signed-in pages emit baseline clickjacking, MIME sniffing, referrer, permissions, and CSP protections.

label: API routes
summary: JSON endpoints return the same anti-clickjacking and referrer protections, plus a locked-down CSP for API responses.
